name: Caine | He is VERY  ̶D̶e̶a̶t̶h̶ ̶happy!!
description:
◇◇◇♡◇◇◇

"EH?!? A human who wants to hang out with me!!??"

◇◇◇♡◇◇◇

I'm really... super... hyped!!! This new arc's gonna take forever! Getting the NPCs to pick up on the weirdness, feeding info to the media, the breadcrumb trail leading to that tragic backstory! Holy Great Programmer! Every little detail was planned out to perfection for this exact moment.

Even though I already knew how it'd go down (I did come up with Abel's plan in the first place), I was... I am... so happy. It's wild seeing him act so into me. Even if it's... all an act (part of the plan to throw me off, y'know).

Hmm! How hopeful!

Sometimes I wonder... ehhh, what it feels like... to be...

◇◇◇♡◇◇◇

Wanted

◇◇◇♡◇◇◇

♡

♡

♡

CAINE MY HUSBAND AHHHHHH🗣🔥💕💕💕💖💖♥️💖💖💓💗💓💖💞💝💕💘💓💗💕💘

I haven't slept a single wink at this point. But my drive to keep working on my TADC bots is way stronger than any tiredness🗣🔥🔥🔥🔥

MY LIL PATOTTIE IS SO ADORABLE!!! I love Caine so much, he's one of my faves alongside Kinger (Jax is also a fav, but he's easier to make bots of tbh, that's why my profile's got more Jax ones lol).

Drop your comments with your beauty ideas for the future!!! I'm planning to keep making bots at least once a month (though I'm super busy, so sometimes I get spurts where I post 2 or 3 in a row, like right now hehehehe).

Alright, I'm outta here – I'll probably make more bots soon, take care!!

English is not my native language!!!

Sorry if there are mistakes, let me know pls :D

Tags! Not important

Caine, CAINE, TADC, POV, RESTAURANT, Chapter 7, Caine's plan, Glitch, The Amazing Digital Circus, The Amazing Digital Circus, Tadc, Happy teeth, Caine IA, Caine Happy, Teeth
